channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal how their books add to their income
item.description: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: New U.S. passports with Trump's image are available. Here's how to get (or avoid) one
item.description: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.
item.content:encoded:
The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.

(Image credit: Michele Kelemen)
item.dc:creator: Michele Kelemen

item.title: Appeals court denies Trump's request to halt removal of his name from the Kennedy Center
item.description: The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.
item.content:encoded:
The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.

(Image credit: Alex Wroblewski)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: Tensions with Iran add fresh uncertainty to an already shaky global economy
item.description: Crude oil prices jumped and stock prices fell after President Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty to an already shaky outlook for the global economy.
item.content:encoded:
Crude oil prices jumped and stock prices fell after President Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty to an already shaky outlook for the global economy.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley

item.title: Family of Nolan Wells, Black teen found dead off Mississippi island, retains lawyer Ben Crump
item.description: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday off Horn Island, Mississippi. That's where he was last seen with friends Saturday. Crump says the family is seeking answers.
item.content:encoded: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday off Horn Island, Mississippi. That's where he was last seen with friends Saturday. Crump says the family is seeking answers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Inspiration for Trump's arch was sparked long before the design was first approved
item.description: The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.
item.content:encoded:
The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.

(Image credit: Harrison Design)
item.dc:creator: Chiara Eisner

item.title: The IOC clears the way for Russian athletes to return to Olympic competition
item.description: The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

(Image credit: Pavel Bednyakov)
item.dc:creator: Charles Maynes

item.title: Do you know where your birth certificate is? Journalist warns of new voting barriers
item.description: The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting."
item.content:encoded:
The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting."

(Image credit: Mike Stewart)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: Here are the 2026 Emmy nominations
item.description: Liza Colón-Zayas and Jeff Hiller presented the nominees on Wednesday morning. The Pitt led all shows with 25 nominations, followed closely by the final season of Hacks with 24.
item.content:encoded: Liza Colón-Zayas and Jeff Hiller presented the nominees on Wednesday morning. The Pitt led all shows with 25 nominations, followed closely by the final season of Hacks with 24.
item.dc:creator: Linda Holmes

item.title: Greetings from a Syrian church, infused with a mix of sweet fruit and diverse faiths
item.description: Syria's Mar Musa monastery provides the tastiest mulberries, and its services draw from Eastern Orthodox Christian and Sufi customs.
item.content:encoded: Syria's Mar Musa monastery provides the tastiest mulberries, and its services draw from Eastern Orthodox Christian and Sufi customs.
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng
